summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental U.S. Large Company ETF (FNDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a fundamentally selected and weighted index of large-cap US companies based on sales, cash flow and dividends/buybacks. FNDX was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

holdings.infoBox: FNDX is an equity ETF with a total of 740 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 4.56%, Microsoft at 2.20%, Exxon Mobil at 2.19%, Alphabet at 1.96%, and Intel at 1.81%.
